calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Michele Trausch appearing for trustee. Nancy Levin appearing for Jane and Clement Galante. James Kaller appearing as Guardian Ad Litem for Evan & John Galante. Anthony Bedwell-Coll for Martha Galante. Settlement reached. The two petitions for instructions are off calendar. The petition for approval of settlement is granted. Court retains jurisdiction to enforce the settlement. Court will review the order before signing it. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
